prerequisites.label: GoHighLevel Private Integration Token (PIT)
prerequisites.satisfy: Add GOHIGHLEVEL_API_KEY=<your PIT> to ~/.openclaw/secrets/.env (chmod 600), then run: openclaw config set env.vars.GOHIGHLEVEL_API_KEY "$GOHIGHLEVEL_API_KEY". Get the PIT from GHL Settings > Integrations > Private Integrations. GHL has no API keys; this is a PIT.

prerequisites.label: GoHighLevel Location ID
prerequisites.satisfy: Add GOHIGHLEVEL_LOCATION_ID=<your location id> to ~/.openclaw/secrets/.env, then: openclaw config set env.vars.GOHIGHLEVEL_LOCATION_ID "$GOHIGHLEVEL_LOCATION_ID".

prerequisites.label: Convert and Flow Firebase refresh token (workflow writes only)
prerequisites.satisfy: Optional. Needed only for workflow build/edit. Grab it with the Token Grabber Chrome extension (Skill 44 INSTALL.md Action 5b), paste into ~/.openclaw/secrets/.env as GOHIGHLEVEL_FIREBASE_REFRESH_TOKEN, then re-run wire-ghl-env.sh.

prerequisites.label: Skill 36 - GHL MCP Setup
prerequisites.satisfy: Install Skill 36 first (it is the 6-tier GHL access chain; Skill 44 is Tier 0 inside it). It is in the same onboarding package; re-run the installer or install Skill 36 on its own.

prerequisites.label: Python 3.9+
prerequisites.satisfy: Install Python 3.9 or newer. Mac: brew install python@3.12. VPS: ships in the container image.
